run_summary.summary: Active day! 🎉 Liz signed the SOJOS Sunglasses contract on Apr 17 and said she'll start on content early next week — moving that to Content. The Aqara Cameras reel went live on Apr 16 (Liz confirmed it to the Aqara contact and shared the IG link) — moving to Delivered, time to send that invoice. Flexsteel's 3-video series with Steinhafels is in full swing: Video 1 filming early this week, Steinhafels Downers Grove visit Thursday Apr 24, Video 2 early following week, Video 3 week of May 13 (slightly delayed — Kenny's dad has a pacemaker replacement + follow-up). Kenny still needs to apply to Popfly's upload platform so Ian can receive drafts. Also, Goldfish Swim School reached out via CreatorOpportunity for a paid parenting/swim campaign — no rate specified but it's negotiable, and their review window closes around Apr 20-22.

suggestions.message: Aqara reel went live Apr 16 — get that invoice out ASAP! 💸
Kenny: apply to the Popfly upload platform today (you told Ian you would) so they can receive video drafts when ready.
New inbound paid campaign via CreatorOpportunity — review window closes ~Apr 22. Worth a look? No rate specified but terms are negotiable. Reply to lilly@creatoropportunity.com.

deals.next_action: Film and submit content for SOJOS

deals.notes: [Apr 17]: 3-video series actively in motion. Video 1 concept ready, filming early this week; draft to Ian by ~Apr 25. Steinhafels Downers Grove IL visit: Thu Apr 24 (Video 2 content). Video 3: week of May 13-14 — Kenny's dad has pacemaker replacement + follow-up in Naples FL, will film with him after he returns May 12. Ian at Popfly (ian@popfly.com) asked Kenny to apply/join Popfly's upload platform — Kenny confirmed he'll do it today. Ian noted Video 3 timing is later than hoped but accepted the explanation.
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: Content timeline confirmed with Ian at Popfly. 3-video series: Video 1 ~Apr 25, Video 2 ~Apr 28, Video 3 ~May 13-14. Steinhafels Downers Grove IL. Kenny joining Popfly platform today.

deals.next_action: Decide whether to apply to campaign via CreatorOpportunity portal
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Inbound paid campaign via CreatorOpportunity platform. Campaign: 'Let's Talk Parenting, Safety & Swim' — national swim school franchise targeting family-focused creators. Deliverables (negotiable): 1 IG Post (Reel or Static) OR 1 TikTok OR 1 YouTube + 1-year content licensing. No rate specified — they invite creators to propose own terms. Must apply via their portal. 3-5 day review window; deadline ~Apr 20-22. Reply contact: lilly@creatoropportunity.com.
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: Inbound paid campaign from Goldfish Swim School via CreatorOpportunity. Review deadline ~Apr 22 — needs decision.
